entry.value: SELECT *, TRIM(CASE WHEN disaster_type = 1 THEN 'Tornado' WHEN disaster_type = 2 THEN 'Wildfire' WHEN disaster_type = 3 THEN 'Flood' WHEN disaster_type = 4 THEN 'Earthquake' WHEN disaster_type = 5 THEN 'Hurricane' WHEN disaster_type = 6 THEN 'Drought' END) AS disaster_mapped FROM FLOWFILE
SELECT *, CASE WHEN __op = 'c' THEN 'create' WHEN __op = 'u' THEN 'update' WHEN __op = 'd' THEN 'delete' WHEN __op = 'r' THEN 'read' END AS operation_type FROM FLOWFILE

SELECT disaster_id, disaster_mapped, location, deaths AS deaths_number, injured AS injured_number, families_affected AS families_affected_number, response_team AS response_team_name, response_time_hours, "year", "month", "day", __deleted AS isDeleted, __source_ts_ms AS source_time_ms, operation_type FROM FLOWFILE
